title: Fix precompact hook to post to Discord visibly

log.context: Fix precompact hook to post to Discord visibly

Done. Here's a summary of what was changed:

**File:** `/mnt/data/scripts/hooks/pre-compact.sh`

Replaced the inject endpoint call (which only sent a synthetic message to the bot itself) with a direct Discord bot API call using `curl`. The new code:
1. Reads `DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN` from the `.env` file
2. POSTs directly to `https://discord.com/api/v10/channels/1485343472952148008/messages`
3. Uses `|| true` so a failure never blocks compaction
